title: Icon Picker
description: Emoji + lucide + phosphor icon picker with search, 10-color Notion palette, Twemoji/native toggle, recents tracking, smart positioning. Two-tab layout (Emoji|Icon) with sub-variant pills (Native|Twemoji / Lucide|Phosphor fill). One string stores emoji OR `lucide:Name` OR `phosphor:Name` OR with `?c=hex` tint — backwards-compat with raw-emoji fields. Popover auto-flips on collision and falls back to a centered Dialog when neither side fits. Two variants: Popover (compact trigger) and Inline (full sheet/dialog use).
